heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 8212 Authorization of appropriations
notes: Amendments1991—, renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 102–40, § 402(b)(2)(B)section 5072 of this titleSubsec. (a). , substituted “8213” for “5073”.Pub. L. 102–40, § 402(d)(1)
amendments: Amendments1991—, renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 102–40, § 402(b)(2)(B)section 5072 of this titleSubsec. (a). , substituted “8213” for “5073”.Pub. L. 102–40, § 402(d)(1)

children.label: a
children.text: There is authorized to be appropriated $25,000,000 for the fiscal year ending , and a like sum for each of the six succeeding fiscal years. Sums appropriated pursuant to this section shall be used for making grants pursuant to .June 30, 1973section 8213 of this title

children.label: b
children.text: Sums appropriated pursuant to subsection (a) of this section shall remain available until the end of the sixth fiscal year following the fiscal year for which they are appropriated.
